mnemonics.title: Parser Types
mnemonics.content:
Top-Down: Root to Leaves (Like growing tree from seed)
Bottom-Up: Leaves to Root (Like building tree from branches)

mnemonics.title: Shift-Reduce Operations
mnemonics.content: SARA: Shift, Accept, Reduce, Error - the four operations of shift-reduce parsing

mnemonics.title: Left Recursion Elimination
mnemonics.content: LR Elimination: Original A → Aα | β becomes A → βA' and A' → αA' | ε

mnemonics.title: Parser Generators
mnemonics.content:
YACC: Your Awesome Compiler Creator (for LALR parsers)
ANTLR: Another Neat Tool for Language Recognition
